title: SEC1: base64 dep duplicated instead of using workspace
description: wasm/Cargo.toml line 38: base64 = '0.22' is specified independently instead of base64.workspace = true. If the workspace bumps base64 (e.g. to 0.23), the wasm crate will continue to use 0.22 — two versions will coexist, potentially causing type mismatches at the nie-core boundary (base64::Engine impl from 0.22 vs 0.23 are different types). Fix: change to 'base64.workspace = true' matching how serde, serde_json, anyhow are already handled in the same file.
